name: Coconut Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the rolled oats until fine and transfer to a bowl.
2. Blend the remaining ingredients (except flour) until smooth.
3. Stir together all the ingredients in another bowl and knead for 1 minute.
4. Pinch off about 1 tbsp of dough and roll between your hands to make a stick that is 2-3 inches long.
5. Bake on an oiled cookie sheet at 350°F for 25 minutes.
